title: PlanReviewDecideOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_decide`: the verdict partition after Pass-3 + DET merge + advisory cap. The blocking set is exempt from the cap; advisory is split at the cap into surfaced/overflow.

surfaced.description: Surfaced advisory findings (top-N by priority) — coached by Pass-4.

dropped.description: Pass-3 dropped findings (low validity / citation veto).

outcome_counts.description: Single-run {clean, recovered, empty_outcomes, unrecoverable} tally at the decide boundary (unrecoverable always 0).
